languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, я терплю! Терплю... Но сколько еще?"{n} Губы человека кривятся особенно сильно, и он на миг зажмуривает глаза. Из-под воспаленного стыка черепа и импланта толчком выплескивается новая порция розовой слизи.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, я терплю! Терплю... Но сколько еще?"{n} Губы человека кривятся особенно сильно и он на миг зажмуривает глаза. Из-под воспаленного стыка черепа и импланта толчком выплескивается новая порция розовой слизи.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Captain, I'm doing my best! I am... But how much longer can I go on?"{n} The man's lips twist into a pained grimace, and he closes his eyes for a moment. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the inflamed seam between his skull and the implant.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, я терплю! Терплю... Но сколько еще?"{n} Губы человека кривятся особенно сильно, и он на миг зажмуривает глаза. Из-под воспаленного стыка черепа и импланта толчком выплескивается новая порция розовой слизи.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, I am doing my best! I am... But how much longer must I wait?"{n} The man's lips twist into a pained grimace, and he closes his eyes for a moment. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the inflamed seam between his skull and the implant.{/n}

"Lord Captain, I am doing my best! I am... But how much longer must I wait?"{n} The man's lips twist into a pained grimace, and he closes his eyes for a moment. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the inflamed seam between his skull and the implant.{/n}

"Lord Captain, I'm doing my best! I am... But how much longer can I go on?"{n} The man's lips twist into a pained grimace, and he closes his eyes for a moment. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the inflamed seam between his skull and the implant.{/n}

"Lord Captain, I'm doing my best! I am... But how much longer can I go on?"{n} The man's lips twist into a pained grimace, and he closes his eyes for a moment. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the inflamed seam between his skull and the implant.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Captain, ich tue mein Bestes! Ja ... Aber wie lange halte ich noch durch?"{n} Der Mann verzieht sein Gesicht zu einer schmerzerfüllten Grimasse und schließt für einen Moment die Augen. Rosafarbener Schleim sickert aus der entzündeten Fuge zwischen seinem Schädel und dem Implantat.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I'm doing my best! I am... But how much longer can I go on?"{n} The man's lips twist into a pained grimace, and he closes his eyes for a moment. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the inflamed seam between his skull and the implant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, ich tue mein Bestes! Ja ... Aber wie lange halte ich noch durch?"{n} Der Mann verzieht sein Gesicht zu einer schmerzerfüllten Grimasse und schließt für einen Moment die Augen. Rosafarbener Schleim sickert aus der entzündeten Fuge zwischen seinem Schädel und dem Implantat.{/n}

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, je fais vraiment de mon mieux ! Je suis... Mais combien de temps vais-je encore tenir ainsi ? »{n} Les lèvres de l'homme se tordent en une grimace de douleur. Il ferme les yeux un instant. Une goutte de mucus rose jaillit de la jonction inflammée entre son crâne et l'implant.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I'm doing my best! I am... But how much longer can I go on?"{n} The man's lips twist into a pained grimace, and he closes his eyes for a moment. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the inflamed seam between his skull and the implant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, je fais vraiment de mon mieux ! Je suis... Mais combien de temps vais-je encore tenir ainsi ? »{n} Les lèvres de l'homme se tordent en une grimace de douleur. Il ferme les yeux un instant. Une goutte de mucus rose jaillit de la jonction inflammée entre son crâne et l'implant.{/n}

languages.text: “舰长大人，我尽力了！真的……但我还能撑多久？”{n}男人的嘴唇痛苦地扭曲，短暂地闭上双眼。一团新鲜的粉色粘液从他头骨与植入物红肿的接缝处喷涌而出。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I'm doing my best! I am... But how much longer can I go on?"{n} The man's lips twist into a pained grimace, and he closes his eyes for a moment. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the inflamed seam between his skull and the implant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，我尽力了！真的……但我还能撑多久？”{n}男人的嘴唇痛苦地扭曲，短暂地闭上双眼。一团新鲜的粉色粘液从他头骨与植入物红肿的接缝处喷涌而出。{/n}

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, ¡hago lo que puedo! De verdad... Pero ¿cuánto tiempo podré aguantar?».{n} Los labios del hombre esbozan una mueca de dolor y, por un momento, cierra los ojos. Un nuevo glóbulo de moco rosa brota de la fisura inflamada que separa su cráneo del implante.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I'm doing my best! I am... But how much longer can I go on?"{n} The man's lips twist into a pained grimace, and he closes his eyes for a moment. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the inflamed seam between his skull and the implant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, ¡hago lo que puedo! De verdad... Pero ¿cuánto tiempo podré aguantar?».{n} Los labios del hombre esbozan una mueca de dolor y, por un momento, cierra los ojos. Un nuevo glóbulo de moco rosa brota de la fisura inflamada que separa su cráneo del implante.{/n}

languages.text: 「ロード・キャプテン、私はベストを尽くしています！私は...でも、あとどれだけ続けられるのか？」{n} 男の唇が苦痛に歪み、一瞬目を閉じる。頭蓋骨とインプラントの間の炎症部分から、ピンク色の粘液が噴き出す。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I'm doing my best! I am... But how much longer can I go on?"{n} The man's lips twist into a pained grimace, and he closes his eyes for a moment. A fresh glob of pink mucus spurts out from the inflamed seam between his skull and the implant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ロード・キャプテン、私はベストを尽くしています！私は...でも、あとどれだけ続けられるのか？」{n} 男の唇が苦痛に歪み、一瞬目を閉じる。頭蓋骨とインプラントの間の炎症部分から、ピンク色の粘液が噴き出す。{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, elimden geleni yapıyorum! Yapıyorum... Fakat daha ne kadar dayanabilirim?" {n}Adamın dudakları, acı dolu bir yüz ifadesiyle çarpılıyor ve bir anlığına gözlerini kapatıyor. Kafatası ile implant arasındaki iltihaplı dikişten yeni bir damla pembe mukus akıyor.{/n}
